honeypot.label: Honeypot field
honeypot.description: Adds a hidden field that bots fill in but humans never see.

time_gate.label: Minimum submission time
time_gate.description: Rejects submissions completed faster than a human could type.

nonce.label: Nonce verification
nonce.description: Requires a valid WordPress nonce to prevent cross-site forgeries.

link_limit.label: Link limit
link_limit.description: Flags submissions containing too many URLs.

keyword_block.label: Blocked keywords
keyword_block.description: Rejects submissions containing known spam keywords or patterns.
